release_caveats.coverage_caveat: synthetic fixture covers one method, one dataset, one protocol, and one metric only
release_caveats.comparability_caveat: synthetic fixture is comparable only to itself and is not external literature evidence
release_caveats.leakage_caveat: synthetic fixture declares a frozen split but does not exercise real leakage checks
release_caveats.provenance_caveat: hashes are fixture placeholders used only to validate schema shape
release_caveats.source_ledger_caveat: no external comparison ledger is used in this synthetic fixture
release_caveats.ranking_caveat: single-row ranking group validates structure only and does not imply superiority

evidence_artifacts.generated_by_command: synthetic fixture committed by hand; no benchmark execution
evidence_artifacts.artifact_caveat: fixture artifact validates schema failure paths only

method_registry.training_data_policy: no training data; fixture row only
method_registry.method_caveat: not a real estimator and not a benchmarked method
method_registry.compute_environment_caveat: compute environment is not measured for fixture rows

dataset_registry.provenance_caveat: dataset row is synthetic and not derived from laboratory data
dataset_registry.availability_caveat: available only as a committed fixture row

protocols.leakage_guard: declared fixture split; no real training or calibration path
protocols.protocol_caveat: protocol validates monthly snapshot schema only

ranking_groups.title: Synthetic MAE Fixture Group
ranking_groups.ranking_caveat: single synthetic row; ranking is structural only

caveats.comparability_caveat: comparable only within this synthetic fixture
caveats.dataset_caveat: synthetic dataset row has no laboratory provenance
caveats.metric_caveat: synthetic metric is not a real BSEBench score
caveats.provenance_caveat: hash values are fixed placeholders for schema validation
caveats.compute_caveat: runtime and memory were not measured for this fixture
caveats.exclusion_caveat: row is not excluded; fixture status is valid for schema validation only
